dc_description_s: This data represents roads for Polk County, Wisconsin in 2026. [This street centerline layer is used for a wide variety of applications. The vector line data represents the geographic center of the road right-of-way transportation network in Polk County, WI. Although at times, surveying or GPS collection methods have been used, orthoimagery has been the primary source used to digitize the roadways.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
